prestazioni: Engine: Mercedes-AMG M297 7.3L V12 (naturally aspirated, dry-sump lubrication) with a bespoke Pagani Motorsport-spec billet crankshaft (forged 4340 steel, 85mm stroke) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods (titanium bolts, 144mm center-to-center length) to handle 9,500 RPM redline and 850+ HP on 102-octane race fuel. Compression ratio increased to 13.5:1 via custom Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (94mm bore, CNC-machined crowns with anti-detonation grooves).

Induction: Full titanium intake manifold (Pagani Motorsport in-house design) with 12 individual throttle bodies (80mm diameter, CNC-machined from 6AL-4V titanium) paired with a custom carbon fiber plenum (autoclave-cured, 3K twill weave) and a secondary air injection system (for Le Mans endurance compliance). Exhaust system replaced with a 4-into-1-into-2 Inconel 625 header (1.75" primary tubes, 3.5" collectors) mated to a straight-pipe titanium exhaust (Grade 2, 0.8mm wall thickness) with dual 120mm outlets and a secondary butterfly valve system for backpressure optimization at high RPM.

Drivetrain: Xtrac P1297 6-speed sequential transaxle (dog-ring engagement, magnesium case) with a 2.6:1 final drive ratio and a carbon fiber driveshaft (Toray T800, 30mm diameter). Clutch upgraded to a Sachs Racing triple-plate carbon-carbon unit (240mm diameter, 3,500 Nm torque capacity) with a hydraulic release bearing system (AP Racing CP7580-10). Limited-slip differential replaced with a Drexler Motorsport 3-way adjustable unit (preload, ramp angles, and locking percentage adjustable via external adjuster).
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full Pagani LM-spec carbon fiber aero package (autoclave-cured, 12K twill weave) including a front splitter with integrated dive planes (adjustable angle via quick-release carbon fiber inserts), a rear diffuser with active Gurney flap (electrically actuated, 0-25mm range), and a fixed rear wing (3.2m² surface area, NACA 63A012 airfoil profile) with dual carbon fiber endplates (3D-printed lattice structure for weight reduction). Underbody features a full-length venturi tunnel with titanium skid plates (Grade 5, 1.5mm thickness).

Bodywork: Full carbon fiber body panels (pre-preg, oven-cured) with a custom "LM Edition" livery featuring a matte silver base (PPG "Silverstone" with 20% flake reduction for weight savings), hand-painted red and blue accents (PPG Vibrance Collection, 3-stage clearcoat), and a central stripe in Pagani "Rosso Monza" (historical Le Mans tribute). Side skirts replaced with wider carbon fiber units (integrated LED running lights, Cree XHP70.2 LEDs) and a removable roof panel (carbon fiber honeycomb core, 1.2kg weight).

Interior: Full carbon fiber monocoque chassis (visible weave, 3K twill) with a bespoke OMP HTE-R seat (carbon-Kevlar hybrid, 6-point Schroth Racing harnesses) and a custom steering wheel (carbon fiber, Alcantara grip, integrated Motec C127 dash display). Pedal box upgraded to a Tilton 600-series (adjustable reach, titanium pivot points) with a carbon fiber heel plate. Roll cage replaced with a Pagani Motorsport FIA-spec unit (chromoly steel, TIG-welded, 38mm diameter tubes) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360, 4kg Novec 1230 agent).
